summary: Adjusted the opening entry point to avoid repeating chapter_09's technical-anomaly scaffold and added a light bridge to the prior chapter's morning check-in; exit continuity to chapter_09 already held via the Annex Three call-sheet beat.
edits: Reordered the opening to start on a rain-and-space anchor instead of the export anomaly.
Inserted one sentence about the morning check-in to smooth chapter_07 to chapter_08 handoff.
Preserved the existing Annex Three call-sheet exit setup for chapter_09 continuity.
